prompt: A narrow, dimly lit corridor stretches forward, its concrete floor cracked and overgrown with patches of green weeds. The walls, once painted a pale gray, are now heavily weathered, with large sections of paint peeling away to reveal the rough texture beneath. Along the sides, rusted metal railings stand at intervals, their surfaces corroded and faded. At the far end, a set of stairs ascends into a brighter, shadowy area. On the left, an old, abandoned arcade machine stands, its screen dark and its casing covered in grime. Fluorescent lights hang from the ceiling, casting a cold, uneven glow that highlights the decay and stillness of the space. The overall atmosphere is one of quiet abandonment and forgotten time.
